site.title: Wavefella — Water Sports Equipment for Controlled Environments
site.description: CE-certified inflatable SUP boards, kayaks, dinghies, RIBs, and safety equipment for training, recreation, and professional marine operations.
site.keywords: inflatable SUP, kayak, dinghy, RIB, water sports equipment, marine safety, CE certified
hero.title: Watercraft for controlled water environments
hero.subtitle: Inflatable boats, SUPs, kayaks, RIBs, and safety gear engineered for performance, built for safety.
philosophy.title: Our Philosophy
philosophy.card1.title: Environment-First Design
philosophy.card1.desc: Every product is rated for specific water conditions with clear safety guidelines. No universal claims. Just honest, test-verified capability.
philosophy.card2.title: Controlled-Skill Progression
philosophy.card2.desc: Products organized by skill level so every user finds the right platform for their ability — from beginner to professional.
philosophy.card3.title: Safety-as-Standard
philosophy.card3.desc: CE certification is not optional. Every vessel undergoes pressure, buoyancy, and load testing.
problem.title: The challenge
problem.heading: Water sports equipment is rarely matched to the user
problem.desc: Most gear is built for either extreme performance or budget recreation. Little exists for the middle ground.
solution.title: Find your match
solution.heading: Three scenarios, three solutions
preview.beginner.title: Taking your first strokes
preview.beginner.desc: Stable SUP boards for calm lakes. Clear safety guidance for beginners.
preview.family.title: A family day on the water
preview.family.desc: Spacious dinghies that inflate at the launch site and pack in the car.
preview.pro.title: Patrol and rescue operations
preview.pro.desc: All-weather RIBs for law enforcement and SAR teams.
trust.title: Start your water journey today
trust.desc: Every product CE certified, every purchase backed by warranty.
faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.a1: Not at all. Most beginners stand up and paddle within their first session.
faq.q2: Can I use it in the ocean?
faq.a2: Yes. Wavefella SUP boards are built for ocean, lake, and river use.
tldr.definition: Wavefella designs and manufactures inflatable watercraft and safety equipment for controlled water environments — lakes, sheltered bays, rivers, training facilities, and coastal waters.
